description: More Curses, tricky moves.
Raise undead minions from fallen foes as ongoing cards.
Healing and targeted support.
Non-elemental damage spells and card recovery.
Maintains spells but adds mobility and protection, with spells to append onto.
Rain down fire on everyone.
Ongoing and single-use cards that let the druid make physical attacks near totems.
Strong elemental magic and zones of elemental power.
A mix of ranged attacks and control, with ongoing animal summons.
Borrows the Mage's append mechanic to add effects to attacks.
More control options and additional coerce cards.
Attacks specializing in bypass and condition clearing, with mobility to reach the back line.
Adds some magical healing and further tanking.
Continues with retaliation, but more offense than defense this time.
More ongoing cards, and cards that call allies to action.
Fighting dirty, with more push and pull effects.
More direct combat moves.
Adds recovery and healing, turning enemy attacks back on them.
Additional effects that focus on a single target enemy.
Still a mobile fighter, but now uses show-off fighting moves against groups.
Leans into stealth and stealing to regain cards.
Leans into cards that deal extra damage from stealth, poison, and bleed.
More storytelling, with ongoing cards that buff allies and hinder enemies.
Illusion magic and tricks that mess with the battlefield itself.
Target and burst down specific enemies, with rewards for killing foes.
More rage, more card cycling, more mayhem.
More direct control on your enemies
Gain power from the damage you deal
Fuel powerful spells with your own life
Turn your basic attacks into powerful blasts
Summon powerful creatures you might be able to control
Summon elementals to aid you
